query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A young child in light blue pajamas walks across a carpeted floor in an indoor residential setting, with wooden furniture visible in the background and a light-colored wall to the right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred young child in light blue pajamas streaks across a carpeted floor, the figure and surroundings smeared horizontally into soft streaks of muted beige and brown, with crushed midtones creating a heavy, dreamlike atmosphere where edges dissolve into haze and the scene feels submerged in dim, oppressive warmth.
